properties.label: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)
properties.description: An approach for working with Large Language Models where the model gains access to an external knowledge base to reduce hallucinations.

properties.label: Retrieval
properties.description: The process of searching for relevant fragments from a document base.

properties.label: Context Injection
properties.description: The process of adding retrieved fragments to the user query.

properties.label: Generation
properties.description: The process where the LLM generates an answer based on real sources.

properties.label: Hallucination
properties.description: The tendency of LLMs to invent facts due to limited memory.

properties.label: Chroma
properties.description: An embedded vector database optimized for working with embeddings, storing data locally in a chroma_db directory.

properties.label: Embeddings
properties.description: Vector representations of data that Chroma is optimized to store and process.

properties.label: Local RAG Systems
properties.description: Retrieval-Augmented Generation systems that run locally, for which Chroma is considered an ideal choice.

properties.label: Similarity Search
properties.description: The operation of finding the nearest vectors to a query vector within the database.

properties.label: Metadata Filtering
properties.description: The operation of quickly selecting vectors based on their associated attributes.

properties.label: Spaced Repetition
properties.description: A learning technique that increases the interval between reviews of information as the learner's memory strengthens.

properties.label: SM-2 Algorithm
properties.description: An algorithm that calculates the next review interval and ease factor for spaced repetition cards.

properties.label: Ease Factor
properties.description: A coefficient in the SM-2 algorithm that determines how quickly the review interval increases, starting at a minimum of 1.3.

properties.label: Review Interval
properties.description: The time period between successive reviews of a card, calculated by multiplying the previous interval by the ease factor.

properties.label: Guardrails
properties.description: Security filters that check input and output data to reduce the risk of incorrect or dangerous LLM responses.

properties.label: Input Control
properties.description: Checking the request for toxicity.

properties.label: Output Control
properties.description: Checking the response for accuracy.

properties.label: Filtering
properties.description: Blocking unwanted content.

properties.label: Hybrid Search
properties.description: A search method that combines BM25 sparse retrieval with vector search for improved accuracy.

properties.label: BM25
properties.description: A sparse retrieval algorithm used in hybrid search.

properties.label: Vector Search
properties.description: A dense retrieval method based on vector embeddings, used in hybrid search.

properties.label: RRF
properties.description: A method to combine results from multiple search systems using a reciprocal rank formula.

properties.label: Fast Mode
properties.description: A search mode that uses only vector search for speed.

properties.label: Quality Mode
properties.description: A search mode that uses hybrid search (BM25 + vector) for higher accuracy.

properties.label: Python
properties.description: A high-level programming language known for its simplicity and readability.

properties.label: int
properties.description: A data type representing integers.

properties.label: float
properties.description: A data type representing floating point numbers.

properties.label: str
properties.description: A data type representing strings.

properties.label: bool
properties.description: A data type representing boolean values.

properties.label: If Statements
properties.description: A control flow structure for conditional execution.

properties.label: For loops
properties.description: A control flow structure that iterates over sequences.

properties.label: While loops
properties.description: A control flow structure that runs while a condition is true.

properties.label: Functions
properties.description: A block of code defined with the def keyword.

properties.label: Demo Corpus
properties.description: A collection of open-source educational markdown fragments used for public deployment and evaluation.

properties.label: Python Basics
properties.description: Fundamental Python programming concepts covered in the demo corpus.

properties.label: Hometutor 101
properties.description: A self-demo course pack containing lectures, smart summaries, media, and videos.

properties.label: Hugging Face Spaces
properties.description: A platform used for deploying the demo corpus.

properties.label: Evaluation Dataset
properties.description: A JSON dataset used for evaluating the demo corpus.

properties.label: Defense Evaluation Script
properties.description: A Python script used to run defense evaluations on the demo corpus.

properties.label: Pre-index Chroma DB
properties.description: A pre-indexed vector database built using the demo corpus.

properties.label: Living Konspekt
properties.description: A system or interface that displays lesson videos using the media from the hometutor 101 pack.

properties.label: Index
properties.description: A structure built from the folder's files that enables fast searching and retrieval of relevant content.

properties.label: Confidence
properties.description: A signal indicating the quality of the answer's reliance on the provided source materials.

properties.label: Source
properties.description: The specific fragment from the original file that serves as the basis for the generated answer.

properties.label: Local-first
properties.description: An architectural approach where the index, database, and language model run locally on the user's computer.

properties.label: LM Studio
properties.description: A tool used to run the local language model for the system.

properties.label: Петля памяти
properties.description: A core product workflow where an answer leads to a tutor, then a quiz, flashcards, and spaced repetition to solidify knowledge.

properties.label: Тьютор
properties.description: A dialog-based instructional component that provides hints and next steps after a user's error, rather than just stating 'incorrect'.

properties.label: Квиз
properties.description: A mini-assessment taken immediately after an explanation to identify weak points and generate flashcards.

properties.label: Карточки
properties.description: Study items generated from quiz errors that are scheduled for review based on spaced repetition algorithms.

properties.label: Повторение
properties.description: The act of recalling information at scheduled intervals to prevent forgetting and strengthen memory.

properties.label: Ошибка как учебный актив
properties.description: The concept that mistakes made during practice are valuable data points that should be converted into flashcards for review.

properties.label: SM-2
properties.description: An algorithm for spaced repetition that adjusts the interval between reviews based on the user's performance.

properties.label: Бейдж К повторению
properties.description: A notification indicator showing the total number of flashcards that need to be reviewed at a given time.

properties.label: Иллюзия знания
properties.description: The cognitive bias where understanding a concept feels like remembering it, leading to skipped practice.

properties.label: Умный Маршрутизатор
properties.description: A mechanism that recommends one best next step with an explanation of reasons based on user data.

properties.label: Сигналы
properties.description: Data points used to generate recommendations, including review queue, weak topics, pause status, and pace.

properties.label: Квитанция
properties.description: A micro-summary after a step showing the before-and-after state of the user's progress.

properties.label: Дельта плана
properties.description: A block showing what changed in the personal plan, listing items that appeared and disappeared.

properties.label: Персональный план
properties.description: A dynamic weekly plan built from weak points and pace, recalculated as successes occur.

properties.label: Карта знаний
properties.description: A graph-based visualization of knowledge that displays concepts, connections, and the user's mastery level at each node, replacing simple progress counters.

properties.label: Узел
properties.description: A discrete unit of knowledge within the map, representing a concept with an associated mastery level and value score.

properties.label: Цена узла
properties.description: A calculated metric determining the value of a node based on recency, mastery status, and importance to the rest of the map.

properties.label: Авто: маршрут дня
properties.description: A feature that selects high-value nodes and arranges them into a logical study path for the day.

properties.label: Слои карты
properties.description: Overlays on the knowledge graph including mastery levels, time-based fading, and the boundary of studied material.

properties.label: Закреплённый концепт
properties.description: A concept that has been mastered, causing it to disappear from the gap-filling plan and triggering a celebration ceremony.

properties.label: Шаткий концепт
properties.description: A concept that is not yet mastered and remains in the study plan, often requiring verification via quizzes.

properties.label: Живая карта (HTML)
properties.description: An interactive offline HTML file export of the knowledge map that can be compared over time.

properties.label: 3D-зал
properties.description: A volumetric HTML export of the map where floors represent lessons and node height represents price.

properties.label: Паспорт качества
properties.description: A table of ten criteria with scores and comments that evaluates the quality of a study note, serving as a label for the product's composition and honesty.

properties.label: Статусы понимания
properties.description: Three statuses per section ('understood', 'doubtful', 'not understood') that track the learner's comprehension level instead of a simple 'read' signal.

properties.label: Открытые вопросы
properties.description: Questions recorded by the learner in a dedicated field to address gaps in understanding, preventing them from being forgotten.

properties.label: Живой конспект
properties.description: A personalized compilation of lecture sections that preserves the learner's notes, statuses, and questions even after the source material is updated.

properties.label: Голос и таймкоды
properties.description: Feature linking lecture sections to specific timestamps in the original audio recording, allowing for playback of authentic lecturer voice rather than synthesis.

properties.label: Антипаттерн: Ставить всем разделам «понял»
properties.description: The mistake of marking all sections as understood to create a sense of progress, which leads to hidden comprehension gaps surfacing later.

properties.label: Честный отказ
properties.description: A system behavior where errors are reported immediately with specific causes and hints instead of hanging or spinning indefinitely.

properties.label: Предохранитель (Circuit Breaker)
properties.description: A mechanism that prevents repeated timeouts to a dead connection after a failure, protecting the rest of the system.

properties.label: Local-first архитектура
properties.description: An architecture where indexes, databases, profiles, and models reside on the user's machine, ensuring privacy and offline functionality.

properties.label: Офлайн-ядро
properties.description: The set of features (search, flashcards, notes, knowledge map) that continue to work without the local language model.

properties.label: Экспорт данных
properties.description: The process of backing up progress, flashcards, and profile to allow restoration on another machine.

properties.label: Anki
properties.description: A tool used to export and manage flashcard decks for portability.

properties.label: Пять миров оформления
properties.description: A set of five visual themes available to the user, with the choice saved in their profile.

properties.label: Собрать учебную сессию
properties.description: A bonus feature that automatically gathers a mini-session based on the user's current state.

properties.label: hometutor
properties.description: A local AI-powered home tutor application that answers questions based on user-provided study materials.

properties.label: Быстрый ответ
properties.description: A mode in hometutor that allows users to ask questions and receive answers with confidence scores and source citations.

properties.label: индексация
properties.description: The process where hometutor reads user files and builds a search index before answering questions.

properties.label: Мини-квиз
properties.description: A short assessment generated automatically from the current topic to test understanding and identify errors.

properties.label: Кривая забывания
properties.description: The predictable pattern of memory loss that interval repetition aims to counteract by scheduling reviews just before forgetting occurs.

properties.label: Блок «Сейчас важнее…»
properties.description: A UI element on the main screen displaying the single best next step to prevent choice paralysis.

properties.label: Честный чек
properties.description: A micro-summary after a step showing the delta of changes, such as the reduction in the review queue.

properties.label: Сигналы рекомендации
properties.description: The specific data points (e.g., overdue reviews, weak topics, long pauses) that trigger the Smart Router's suggestions.

properties.label: Граф знаний
properties.description: A visual representation of concepts as nodes and their relationships as edges, showing the structure of learned material.

properties.label: Освоение
properties.description: The measure of how well a concept has been learned, indicated by color and rings on the graph nodes.

properties.label: Выцветание
properties.description: The gradual loss of retention of a concept over time, tracked as a layer on the node.

properties.label: Связь между концептами
properties.description: The directional link indicating which concepts are prerequisites for others.

properties.label: Конспект
properties.description: A dynamic study aid that compresses lecture content while tracking user understanding and providing access to source media.

properties.label: Открытый вопрос
properties.description: A specific doubt or query recorded by the user in a section they find confusing, stored alongside the relevant content.

properties.label: Таймкод
properties.description: A precise time reference linked to a section of the lecture notes, allowing direct navigation to the corresponding video segment.

properties.label: Видеозапись лекции
properties.description: The original audio-visual source material for the lecture, accessible via the notes for playback of specific segments.

properties.label: Full Export
properties.description: A standard scenario for backing up progress, flashcards, and profile data into a single package for restoration on another machine.

properties.label: Study Session Agent
properties.description: An automated mode that generates a mini-session based on the user's current state, determining what to review and what to analyze.

properties.label: World Themes
properties.description: Five customizable color themes (Forest, Ocean, Sunset, Space, Berry) that personalize the user interface and are saved to the user profile.

properties.label: Lesson 1: First Answer
properties.description: The first lesson where a folder becomes a tutor, allowing the user to get an answer for their folder and verify the source by clicking.

properties.label: Lesson 2: Memory Loop
properties.description: The second lesson where knowledge reinforces timely recall, involving a loop of answer, tutor, quiz, and flashcards.

properties.label: Lesson 3: One Next Step
properties.description: The third lesson focusing on navigation rather than mapping, starting the day with 'Now more important...' and reading the 'why' and receipt.

properties.label: Lesson 4: Knowledge Map
properties.description: The fourth lesson where progress is treated as terrain rather than a number, finding weak nodes and downloading a live map.

properties.label: Lesson 5: Notebook with Passport
properties.description: The fifth lesson where the notebook becomes a conversation partner, reading quality rubrics and marking statuses.

properties.label: Lesson 6: System Owner
properties.description: The sixth lesson where trust is tested on a bad day, requiring knowledge of the offline core and performing a full export.

properties.label: Dogfood
properties.description: The practice of using the hometutor product to teach itself, where the course is a folder of markdown files processed by the product.

properties.label: Quickstart Demo
properties.description: The runtime documentation and demo pack that serves as the source of truth for UI facts and scenarios.

properties.label: Auto: Day Route
properties.description: A button or feature in the product that generates a daily route, referenced in Lesson 4.
